summary: A small rectangular ceremonial or decorative structure with a stepped pyramid roof. The building features a brick and stone foundation, a white concrete band, and a dark wood multi-tiered roof. It sits on a raised platform with a white concrete border and dirt foundation.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof

rebuild_hints: Create a 12x12 rectangular footprint on dirt foundation
Build white concrete border platform around perimeter
Construct brick wall face (red/brown brick) with stone trim at base
Add white concrete horizontal band above brick wall
Build stepped pyramid roof using dark wood planks in 3-4 receding layers
Ensure bilateral symmetry on all sides
Roof steps should decrease in size toward center peak
No interior details visible; focus on exterior form
uncertainties: Exact block count for roof steps (appears to be 3-4 layers but perspective makes precise count difficult)
Exact brick pattern and stone trim placement requires closer inspection
Whether structure is hollow or solid internally
Precise height of concrete band relative to brick wall
